states.name: Calm Calibration
states.action: One-pixel breathing, relaxed claws, mouse-directed gaze, one short blink.

states.name: Power-down Stretch
states.action: Stretch both claws, retract, lower the body one pixel, narrow the eyes.

states.name: Dock Nest
states.action: Settle into the dock with closed eyes and a slow attached status light.

states.name: Dock Eject
states.action: Unlock the dock, spring upward, brace the claws, return to neutral.

states.name: Shell Shuffle
states.accessory: three colorful shells on a small cloth
states.action: Check each shell in turn, lift the chosen middle shell, blink, and reset.

states.name: Token Knitting
states.accessory: yarn ball, two needles, and a growing striped ribbon
states.action: Alternate both needles, grow the ribbon through four beats, inspect it, and reset.

states.name: Hatchling Parade
states.action: Wake the helpers one by one, point them forward, and watch them scurry away.

states.name: Stuck Jar
states.action: Twist twice, strain, pause, then push the jar toward the owner for help.

states.name: Memory Press
states.accessory: ground press with rollers, continuous ribbon, and cartridge
states.action: Turn the rollers and compress a connected segmented ribbon into the cartridge.

states.name: Foldout Bench
states.action: Release two latches, unfold the bench, tap both sides to calibrate it.

states.name: Completion Stamp
states.action: Press the stamp, reveal the attached green plate, hop two pixels, settle.

states.name: Jam Recovery
states.accessory: jammed drive shaft, attached red lamp, reverse reset lever
states.action: Brace the frame and pull the reverse lever twice before a short failed pause.
